title: More Nonsense Limerick 94
content:
There was an old person of Bar,
    Who passed all her life in a jar,
    Which she painted pea-green, 
    To appear more serene,
    That placid old person of Bar.
meaning:
Edward Lear's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "More Nonsense Limerick 94"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
